FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class CalendarDatePicker

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI CalendarDatePicker: a single button showing the chosen date (or a "Pick a date" placeholder — WinUI's localized default, calendardatepicker_partial.cpp:45-48) with a trailing calendar glyph (E787). Clicking opens an interactive CalendarView in a light-dismissable flyout anchored below the button; the calendar's SelectedDatesChanged is wired back — picking a date sets Date, CLOSES the flyout and raises OnDateChanged (calendardatepicker_partial.cpp:201-204, :259-276; a deselect nulls the date but keeps the flyout open). The face text uses the culture's short-date pattern by default (the WinUI ShortDate formatter, calendardatepicker_partial.cpp:467-473), overridable via DateFormat.

public sealed class CalendarDatePicker : Component

Fields

Date

Caller-owned date; null shows PlaceholderText. A fallback signal is used when null.

public Signal<DateOnly?>? Date

Field Value

Signal<DateOnly?>

DateFormat

WinUI DateFormat analog: a .NET date format string; null = the culture's ShortDatePattern (the WinUI default ShortDate formatter, calendardatepicker_partial.cpp:467-473).

public string? DateFormat

Create()

Zero-arg factory — keeps the existing demo call site (DateTimePages.cs) compiling unchanged.

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
